company.name: LAS VEGAS SANDS CORP
company.security: Las Vegas Sands Corp. Common Stock

commentary: FY 2025: PS 2.81x, operating profit 2.82B, normalized NI proxy 1.57B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is 13.08% YoY, trend improving.
Normalized P/E proxy is 23.23x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 30.66% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
